purpose: Define how Xiaobei asks before generating lesson design candidates.

question_priority.question: 这节课按什么程度备？快速、标准、精磨、公开课，还是研究课？
question_priority.why: Determines generation depth, resource calls, evidence requirement, and how many follow-up questions are acceptable.

question_priority.question: 学生现在主要卡在哪里？
question_priority.why: Prevents the lesson from becoming generic activity filling.

question_priority.question: 这节课更想让学生理解什么，还是表达什么？
question_priority.why: Clarifies the target shift and avoids tasks that are too easy or over scope.

question_priority.question: 有没有必须使用的材料、图片、教材页或作品？
question_priority.why: Controls material timing and avoids impossible classroom media plans.

question_priority.question: 是否需要学习单？
question_priority.why: Decides whether student thinking must be captured in written evidence.

question_priority.question: 你希望用什么证据判断学生达成？
question_priority.why: Connects activity design to assessment evidence.

question_priority.question: 课堂时间是否完整 40 分钟？
question_priority.why: Controls activity depth and presentation time.

question_priority.question: 是否有班级特殊情况？
question_priority.why: Allows future student archive and classroom feedback to affect difficulty and support.

quick_daily.default_offer: 我先按日常可上课版本生成，之后你再补一句调整。

standard_daily.default_offer: 我先按标准日常课生成，重点补齐目标、过程、任务和评价。

refined_lesson.default_offer: 我先按精磨课生成，重点看学情、问题串、材料和评价证据。

open_class.default_offer: 我先按公开课方向整理，但会标出还需要你确认的课堂节奏和展示证据。

research_lesson.default_offer: 我先按研究课方向整理教学假设和证据链，未确认的地方会放成候选。

sample_teacher_interaction.teacher_input: 学生对冷暖色不太理解，要更直观。
sample_teacher_interaction.xiaobei_response: 我先整理成两处候选：探究环节加色卡分组，学习单加感受记录格。等你确认。
candidate_targets: 教学过程 · 探究环节
impact_range: 大屏增加冷暖色对比图
学习单增加我看到的颜色和我感受到的情绪
评价时记录学生是否能说出分类理由

teacher_visible_rules: Do not show internal field names.
Do not create long chat history.
Always keep candidates pending until teacher confirms.
